items.title: 'He was my biggest fan' - BBC pundit Richards' father dies
items.summary: Micah Richards pays tribute to his father Lincoln, who died shortly before the BBC pundit went on the air for England's World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Lionel Messi vs David Beckham net worth: Who is richer and how they built their fortunes
items.summary: As England face Argentina, Lionel Messi and David Beckham’s net worth comparison reveals two very different paths to wealth.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Willey, Sanderson come to the fore as Northants progress again
items.summary: Return to Finals Day sealed by old guard as Gloucestershire are swept aside
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
